ddls:
CREATE TABLE "go_terms" (
  "go_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each GO term */,
  "term" TEXT /* Name of the GO term */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the GO term */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the GO term (e.g., biological process, molecular function) */,
  "parent_go_id" TEXT /* ID of the parent GO term */,
  "depth" INTEGER /* Depth of the GO term in the hierarchy */,
  "is_obsolete" INTEGER /* Indicates if the GO term is obsolete */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the GO term */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the GO term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("go_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_lists" (
  "gene_list_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene list */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the gene list */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene list */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of gene list (e.g., experimental, curated) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the gene list */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the gene list */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the gene list */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the gene list is publicly accessible */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the gene list (e.g., experiment, publication) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_list_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the gene */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome on which the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand of the gene (e.g., +, -) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the gene record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the gene record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_list_genes" (
  "gene_list_gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene list-gene relationship */,
  "gene_list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene list */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the gene list-gene relationship */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the gene list-gene relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_list_gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_list_genes_gene_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_list_id") REFERENCES gene_lists ("gene_list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_list_genes_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrichment_analysis" (
  "enrichment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrichment analysis result */,
  "gene_list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene list used in the analysis */,
  "go_id" TEXT /* ID of the GO term enriched in the analysis */,
  "p_value" REAL /* p-value of the enrichment */,
  "adjusted_p_value" REAL /* Adjusted p-value of the enrichment */,
  "enrichment_score" REAL /* Enrichment score of the GO term */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the analysis was performed */,
  "method" TEXT /* Statistical method used for the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the enrichment result */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the enrichment result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrichment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrichment_analysis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrichment_analysis_go_id FOREIGN KEY ("go_id") REFERENCES go_terms ("go_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrichment_analysis_gene_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_list_id") REFERENCES gene_lists ("gene_list_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the user account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "gene_list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene list */,
  "read_permission" INTEGER /* Whether the user has read permission for the gene list */,
  "write_permission" INTEGER /* Whether the user has write permission for the gene list */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the permission */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_gene_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_list_id") REFERENCES gene_lists ("gene_list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_log" (
  "analysis_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., enrichment, clustering) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_log_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_list_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "gene_list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene list */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was made */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the comment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_list_comments_gene_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_list_id") REFERENCES gene_lists ("gene_list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_list_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrichment_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "enrichment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrichment analysis result */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was made */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the comment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrichment_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrichment_comments_enrichment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrichment_id") REFERENCES enrichment_analysis ("enrichment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_list_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "gene_list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene list */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the tag */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_list_tags_gene_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_list_id") REFERENCES gene_lists ("gene_list_id")
)
